lines.text: when will you learn, that it's gonna be a faraway way
remember to turn, you're still looking at the sky
they're still ash in the burning,
i knew burning in my heart
is only look, looking like she love me
when i'm playing my guitar she don't listen to me,
she don't listen to me but she listening now,
i seen her face in the crowd
ever since i've been a child, ive been steady going wild, i
can feel it in the air that it's gonna be the night
that i die
let you cry, maybe if i lie on the ground and i
look at the sky i'll be alright,
imma call the angels in the night,
take me to the light you're half a world away
forget my mafia,
whisper every single word of a star,
before you slip and die
praying baby that you're fucking large, you're the same, can you step
out of the light
it's like footsteps in the snow,
it's like footsteps in the snow,
i follow you everywhere you go, i follow you everywhere i go
